descriptionShort: 1993 NHL game footage: Tampa Bay Lightning vs. Toronto Maple Leafs, featuring Richmond Sockeye alumnus Matt Hervey.
descriptionLong: Game footage from March 18, 1993, showing an NHL matchup between the Tampa Bay Lightning and Toronto Maple Leafs. The clip highlights Richmond Sockeyes alumnus Matt Hervey in play, likely in a notable moment against Wendel Clark. This segment captures Hervey's professional career trajectory following his junior-A playing era.
